scripts.render: npm run prepare:media && remotion render src/index.tsx OmegaClawHackathon out/omegaclaw-goalchainer-draft.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p
scripts.render:clean: npm run render && npm run strip:metadata
scripts.render:low: npm run prepare:media && remotion render src/index.tsx OmegaClawHackathon out/omegaclaw-goalchainer-draft-low.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p --scale 0.5
